explanation: The code initializes a graph using an adjacency matrix and reads vertices and edges from an input file called 'graph.txt'. It uses a depth-first search approach to explore the graph, marking visited nodes and tracking the parent of each node to detect cycles. When a cycle is found, it traces the nodes back to the starting point and outputs the cycle. The graph structure and the cycles detected are printed to the console.
name: 2009-06-21_fdfd
subject: fdfd
summary: This project implements an algorithm to enumerate all elementary cycles in an undirected graph represented by an adjacency matrix. It reads graph data from a file, processes it, and outputs the detected cycles.
